name: sidebar
description: The application sidebar primitive: collapsible expanded/icon-rail desktop states, mobile off-canvas overlay, its own provider + trigger (toggle() + Ctrl/Cmd+B shortcut), localStorage persistence, groups/menu/menu-sub with Lucide icons and badges, a <nav> landmark with aria-current on the active item. Light-DOM Lit island.
docs: Register <lv-sidebar> by importing components/ui/sidebar.ts from your entry point. Pass `groups` as { label?, items: { key, label, icon?, href?, badge?, disabled?, items? }[] }[] (icon = a vendored Lucide name; nested `items` become a collapsible sub-tree). Set `active` to the current item key for aria-current; set `side` 'left' | 'right' and `collapsible` 'icon' | 'offcanvas'. Project a logo/user via the `header` / `footer` slots. Call `el.toggle()` (or Ctrl/Cmd+B) to collapse on desktop / open the overlay on mobile; the desktop state persists under `storageKey`. Listen for `lv-navigate` (chosen item key) and `lv-state-change` ('expanded' | 'collapsed').
